symbols: cathedral spire — the aspiration of human devotion reaching toward heaven and the visible presence of the Church in the landscape
vast sky — the majesty and transcendence of the Creator
open fields — God's provision and the pastoral imagery of Scripture
river — living water and divine sustenance
description: A panoramic landscape painting depicting the English countryside around Salisbury under a vast, cloud-filled sky that occupies roughly two-thirds of the canvas. In the middle distance, the tall spire of Salisbury Cathedral rises above a line of dark green trees. A river or stream curves through the flat terrain at center left. The foreground consists of earthy brown fields with scattered vegetation and what appear to be haystacks or harvest debris. The palette is naturalistic: muted greens, browns, and grays with soft breaks of pale blue sky between cumulus clouds.
